en: Now Abraham was old, well advanced in years. And the LORD had blessed Abraham in all things.
zh: 亞伯拉罕老邁了，年事已高，耶和華在一切事上都賜福給他。

en: And Abraham said to his servant, the oldest of his household, who had charge of all that he had, "Put your hand under my thigh,
zh: 亞伯拉罕對他家中最老的，管理他所有產業的那僕人說：“請把你的手放在我的大腿底下。

en: that I may make you swear by the LORD, the God of heaven and God of the earth, that you will not take a wife for my son from the daughters of the Canaanites, among whom I dwell,
zh: 我要你指著耶和華天地的 神起誓，不可從我現在居住的迦南人中，為我的兒子娶他們的女子為妻。

en: but will go to my country and to my kindred, and take a wife for my son Isaac."
zh: 你卻要到我的故鄉、我的親族那裡去，為我的兒子以撒娶妻。”

en: The servant said to him, "Perhaps the woman may not be willing to follow me to this land. Must I then take your son back to the land from which you came?"
zh: 僕人問亞伯拉罕：“如果那女子不願跟我到這地方來，我必須把你的兒子帶回你原出之地去嗎？”

en: Abraham said to him, "See to it that you do not take my son back there.
zh: 亞伯拉罕對他說：“你要謹慎，切不可帶我的兒子回到那裡去。

en: The LORD, the God of heaven, who took me from my father's house and from the land of my kindred, and who spoke to me and swore to me, 'To your offspring I will give this land,' he will send his angel before you, and you shall take a wife for my son from there.
zh: 耶和華天上的 神，就是領我離開我的父家和我親族之地，曾經對我說話，又向我起誓的那位說：‘我必把這地賜給你的後裔。’他必在你前面差派他的使者，你就可以從那裡為我的兒子娶妻。

en: But if the woman is not willing to follow you, then you will be free from this oath of mine; only you must not take my son back there."
zh: 如果那女子不願跟你來，我叫你所起的這誓就與你無關了。只是不可帶我的兒子回到那裡去。”

en: So the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master and swore to him concerning this matter.
zh: 於是，僕人把手放在他主人亞伯拉罕的大腿下，為這事向亞伯拉罕起誓。

en: Then the servant took ten of his master's camels and departed, taking all sorts of choice gifts from his master; and he arose and went to Mesopotamia to the city of Nahor.
zh: 那僕人從他主人的駱駝裡取了十匹駱駝，帶著主人各樣的美物，起程往兩河之間的亞蘭去，到了拿鶴的城。

en: And he made the camels kneel down outside the city by the well of water at the time of evening, the time when women go out to draw water.
zh: 黃昏時分，女人出來打水的時候，那僕人就叫駱駝跪在城外的水井旁邊，

en: And he said, "O LORD, God of my master Abraham, please grant me success today and show steadfast love to my master Abraham.
zh: 然後禱告說：“耶和華我主人亞伯拉罕的 神啊，求你今日使我遇見好機會，施慈愛給我的主人亞伯拉罕。

en: Behold, I am standing by the spring of water, and the daughters of the men of the city are coming out to draw water.
zh: 我現在站在水泉旁邊，城內居民的女兒正出來打水。

en: Let the young woman to whom I shall say, 'Please let down your jar that I may drink,' and who shall say, 'Drink, and I will water your camels'- let her be the one whom you have appointed for your servant Isaac. By this I shall know that you have shown steadfast love to my master."
zh: 我對哪一個少女說：‘請你放下水瓶來，讓我喝點水。’如果她回答：‘請喝，我也給你的駱駝喝。’願那少女就作你選定給你僕人以撒的妻子。這樣，我就知道你施慈愛給我的主人了。”

en: Before he had finished speaking, behold, Rebekah, who was born to Bethuel the son of Milcah, the wife of Nahor, Abraham's brother, came out with her water jar on her shoulder.
zh: 話還沒有說完，不料，利百加肩頭上扛著水瓶出來了。利百加是彼土利所生的。彼土利是亞伯拉罕兄弟拿鶴的妻子密迦的兒子。

en: The young woman was very attractive in appearance, a maiden whom no man had known. She went down to the spring and filled her jar and came up.
zh: 那少女容貌非常美麗，還是個處女，沒有男人親近過她。她下到水泉那裡，打滿了水瓶，又上來。

en: Then the servant ran to meet her and said, "Please give me a little water to drink from your jar."
zh: 僕人就跑去迎著她，說：“請你把瓶裡的水給我喝一點。”

en: She said, "Drink, my lord." And she quickly let down her jar upon her hand and gave him a drink.
zh: 那少女回答：“我主請喝。”就急忙把水瓶拿下來，托在手上給他喝。

en: When she had finished giving him a drink, she said, "I will draw water for your camels also, until they have finished drinking."
zh: 他喝足了，少女就說：“我也要為你的駱駝打水，直到牠們都喝足了。”

en: So she quickly emptied her jar into the trough and ran again to the well to draw water, and she drew for all his camels.
zh: 於是急忙把水瓶裡的水倒在槽裡，又跑到井旁去打水，給他所有的駱駝打上水來。

en: The man gazed at her in silence to learn whether the LORD had prospered his journey or not.
zh: 那人一句話也不說，只注視著她，要知道耶和華使他的道路亨通不亨通。

en: When the camels had finished drinking, the man took a gold ring weighing a half shekel, and two bracelets for her arms weighing ten gold shekels,
zh: 駱駝喝足了，那人就拿出一個重近六克的金鼻環，戴在她的鼻子上，又拿出兩個重一百一十四克的金手鐲，套在她的手上，

en: and said, "Please tell me whose daughter you are. Is there room in your father's house for us to spend the night?"
zh: 然後問她：“請你告訴我，你是誰的女兒？你父親的家裡有地方給我們住宿沒有？”

en: She said to him, "I am the daughter of Bethuel the son of Milcah, whom she bore to Nahor."
zh: 她回答：“我是密迦給拿鶴所生的兒子彼土利的女兒。”

en: She added, "We have plenty of both straw and fodder, and room to spend the night."
zh: 她又說：“我們有很多糧草和飼料，也有住宿的地方。”

en: The man bowed his head and worshiped the LORD
zh: 那人就跪下敬拜耶和華，

en: and said, "Blessed be the LORD, the God of my master Abraham, who has not forsaken his steadfast love and his faithfulness toward my master. As for me, the LORD has led me in the way to the house of my master's kinsmen."
zh: 說：“耶和華我主人亞伯拉罕的 神是應當稱頌的，因為他不斷以慈愛和信實待我的主人；耶和華也一路引導我，到了我主人的兄弟家裡。”

en: Then the young woman ran and told her mother's household about these things.
zh: 那少女就跑回去，把這些事都告訴了她母親家裡的人。

en: Rebekah had a brother whose name was Laban. Laban ran out toward the man, to the spring.
zh: 利百加有一個哥哥，名叫拉班。

en: As soon as he saw the ring and the bracelets on his sister's arms, and heard the words of Rebekah his sister, "Thus the man spoke to me," he went to the man. And behold, he was standing by the camels at the spring.
zh: 他看見了妹妹的鼻環和手上的手鐲，又聽見了妹妹利百加說：“那人對我這樣這樣說”，就跑去見外面水泉旁邊的那人。他來到那人跟前的時候，見他仍然站在駱駝旁邊的水泉那裡。

en: He said, "Come in, O blessed of the LORD. Why do you stand outside? For I have prepared the house and a place for the camels."
zh: 拉班說：“你這蒙耶和華賜福的，請進來吧，為甚麼站在外面呢？我已經收拾好了房間，也為駱駝預備了地方。”

en: So the man came to the house and unharnessed the camels, and gave straw and fodder to the camels, and there was water to wash his feet and the feet of the men who were with him.
zh: 那人就進了拉班的家。拉班卸了駱駝，拿糧草和飼料給駱駝吃，又拿水給那人和與他同來的人洗腳。

en: Then food was set before him to eat. But he said, "I will not eat until I have said what I have to say." He said, "Speak on."
zh: 然後在他面前擺上食物，但那人說：“除非等我說完了我的事，我不會吃。”拉班說：“請說。”

en: So he said, "I am Abraham's servant.
zh: 那人說：“我是亞伯拉罕的僕人。

en: The LORD has greatly blessed my master, and he has become great. He has given him flocks and herds, silver and gold, male servants and female servants, camels and donkeys.
zh: 耶和華厚厚地賜福我主人，他就昌大起來；耶和華又賜給他羊群、牛群、金銀、僕婢、駱駝和驢。

en: And Sarah my master's wife bore a son to my master when she was old, and to him he has given all that he has.
zh: 我主人的妻子撒拉年老的時候，給我主人生了一個兒子。我主人也把他一切所有的都給了這個兒子。

en: My master made me swear, saying, 'You shall not take a wife for my son from the daughters of the Canaanites, in whose land I dwell,
zh: 我主人要我起誓，說：‘你不可從我現在居住的迦南地中，為我的兒子娶迦南的女子為妻。

en: but you shall go to my father's house and to my clan and take a wife for my son.'
zh: 你要到我的父家，和我的族人那裡去，為我的兒子娶一個妻子。’

en: I said to my master, 'Perhaps the woman will not follow me.'
zh: 我問我主人：‘如果那女子不願跟我回來呢？’

en: But he said to me, 'The LORD, before whom I have walked, will send his angel with you and prosper your way. You shall take a wife for my son from my clan and from my father's house.
zh: 他回答：‘我行事為人都在他面前的耶和華，必差派他的使者與你同去，使你的道路亨通，你就可以從我的族人和我的父家，給我的兒子娶一個妻子。

en: Then you will be free from my oath, when you come to my clan. And if they will not give her to you, you will be free from my oath.'
zh: 只要你到了我的族人那裡去，我叫你起的誓就與你無關；他們若不把女子交給你，我叫你起的誓也與你無關。’

en: "I came today to the spring and said, 'O LORD, the God of my master Abraham, if now you are prospering the way that I go,
zh: 我今天到了水泉那裡，就說：‘耶和華我主人亞伯拉罕的 神啊，你若叫我所走的道路亨通，

en: behold, I am standing by the spring of water. Let the virgin who comes out to draw water, to whom I shall say, "Please give me a little water from your jar to drink,"
zh: 那麼，我現在站在水泉旁邊，但願有一個少女出來打水，我要對她說：“請你把瓶裡的水給我喝一點。”

en: and who will say to me, "Drink, and I will draw for your camels also," let her be the woman whom the LORD has appointed for my master's son.'
zh: 她若對我說：“你請喝，我還要打水給你的駱駝喝。”願那女子就作耶和華給我主人的兒子所選定的妻子。’

en: "Before I had finished speaking in my heart, behold, Rebekah came out with her water jar on her shoulder, and she went down to the spring and drew water. I said to her, 'Please let me drink.'
zh: 我心裡的話還沒有說完，利百加就肩頭扛著水瓶出來了，她下到水泉那裡去打水；我就對她說：‘請給我水喝。’

en: She quickly let down her jar from her shoulder and said, 'Drink, and I will give your camels drink also.' So I drank, and she gave the camels drink also.
zh: 她急忙從肩上拿下水瓶來，說：‘請喝，我還要給你的駱駝喝。’我喝了，她也打水給我的駱駝喝。

en: Then I asked her, 'Whose daughter are you?' She said, 'The daughter of Bethuel, Nahor's son, whom Milcah bore to him.' So I put the ring on her nose and the bracelets on her arms.
zh: 於是我問她，說：‘你是誰的女兒？’她回答：‘我是密迦給拿鶴所生的兒子彼土利的女兒。’我就把鼻環戴在她的鼻子上，把手鐲套在她的兩手上。

en: Then I bowed my head and worshiped the LORD and blessed the LORD, the God of my master Abraham, who had led me by the right way to take the daughter of my master's kinsman for his son.
zh: 然後我跪下敬拜耶和華，稱頌耶和華我主人亞伯拉罕的 神，因為他引導我走恰當的路，使我得到我主人的兄弟的孫女，作我主人的兒子的妻子。

en: Now then, if you are going to show steadfast love and faithfulness to my master, tell me; and if not, tell me, that I may turn to the right hand or to the left."
zh: 現在你們若願意以慈愛和信實待我的主人，就請告訴我。如果不願意，也請你們告訴我；使我可以知道怎樣行。”

en: Then Laban and Bethuel answered and said, "The thing has come from the LORD; we cannot speak to you bad or good.
zh: 拉班和彼土利回答，說：“這事既然出於耶和華，我們就不能對你說好說歹。

en: Behold, Rebekah is before you; take her and go, and let her be the wife of your master's son, as the LORD has spoken."
zh: 看哪，利百加就在你面前，你可以把她帶去，照著耶和華所說的，作你主人兒子的妻子。”

en: When Abraham's servant heard their words, he bowed himself to the earth before the LORD.
zh: 亞伯拉罕的僕人聽到了他們這些話，就俯伏在地敬拜耶和華。

en: And the servant brought out jewelry of silver and of gold, and garments, and gave them to Rebekah. He also gave to her brother and to her mother costly ornaments.
zh: 那僕人拿出金器、銀器和衣服送給利百加，又把貴重的禮物送給她的哥哥和她的母親。

en: And he and the men who were with him ate and drank, and they spent the night there. When they arose in the morning, he said, "Send me away to my master."
zh: 然後，僕人和與他同來的人才吃喝，並且住了一夜。他們早晨起來，僕人就說：“請打發我回到我主人那裡去吧！”

en: Her brother and her mother said, "Let the young woman remain with us a while, at least ten days; after that she may go."
zh: 利百加的哥哥和母親說：“讓這女孩子和我們同住多幾天，或是十天，然後她可以離去。”

en: But he said to them, "Do not delay me, since the LORD has prospered my way. Send me away that I may go to my master."
zh: 僕人回答他們：“你們不要挽留我，耶和華既然使我的道路亨通，就請打發我回到我主人那裡去。”

en: They said, "Let us call the young woman and ask her."
zh: 他們說：“我們可以把那女孩子叫來，問問她的意思。”

en: And they called Rebekah and said to her, "Will you go with this man?" She said, "I will go."
zh: 他們把利百加叫了來，問她：“你願意與這人同去嗎？”她回答：“我願意去。”

en: So they sent away Rebekah their sister and her nurse, and Abraham's servant and his men.
zh: 於是，他們把自己的妹妹利百加，她的乳母和亞伯拉罕的僕人，以及同來的人，都打發走了。

en: And they blessed Rebekah and said to her, "Our sister, may you become thousands of ten thousands, and may your offspring possess the gate of those who hate them!"
zh: 他們給利百加祝福，對她說： “我們的妹妹啊， 願你作千萬人之母； 願你的後裔， 佔領仇敵的城門。”

en: Then Rebekah and her young women arose and rode on the camels and followed the man. Thus the servant took Rebekah and went his way.
zh: 利百加和她的眾使女就起來，騎上駱駝，跟著那人走；那僕人就帶著利百加走了。

en: Now Isaac had returned from Beer-lahai-roi and was dwelling in the Negeb.
zh: 那時，以撒剛從庇耳．拉海．萊回來，他原本是住在南地的。

en: And Isaac went out to meditate in the field toward evening. And he lifted up his eyes and saw, and behold, there were camels coming.
zh: 黃昏的時候，以撒出來田間默想。他舉目觀看，忽然看見來了些駱駝。

en: And Rebekah lifted up her eyes, and when she saw Isaac, she dismounted from the camel
zh: 利百加舉目觀看，看見了以撒，就下了駱駝，

en: and said to the servant, "Who is that man, walking in the field to meet us?" The servant said, "It is my master." So she took her veil and covered herself.
zh: 問那僕人：“在田間走來迎接我們的這人是誰？”僕人回答：“他是我的主人。”利百加就拿面紗蒙在面上。

en: And the servant told Isaac all the things that he had done.
zh: 僕人把所作的一切事，都告訴以撒。

en: Then Isaac brought her into the tent of Sarah his mother and took Rebekah, and she became his wife, and he loved her. So Isaac was comforted after his mother's death.
zh: 以撒領利百加進了他母親撒拉的帳棚，並且娶了她。利百加就作了以撒的妻子。以撒愛利百加。以撒自從他母親去世後，這才得了安慰。
